title: Cisco EtherChannels
description: Learn how to configure EtherChannels to bundle multiple physical interfaces into one logical link for redundancy and increased bandwidth.

tasks.prompt: Enter config mode for interfaces f0/1 and f0/2 simultaneously.
tasks.hint: Use the range command to enter more than one interface config mode at once.
tasks.explanation: 'interface range' lets you configure multiple interfaces simultaneously. Use '-' to define the range (e.g., f0/1-2).
